ab: yakai yako tangea ka tabereli sya Kecelre, tara karimoro iloko ini lamanema.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Kecelre，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Kecelre, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: lo kibolobolo nai, kwani wakisalro latabere idra cingpi, samosakisakidra si ciywming.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: angivale, angi’osale, angitolrolo, akisalro iniya makanaelre.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: amanisa, yakai ka malisi iyaiyaiya ini, tara wakisalro si kai sawli.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: sabilrilanenga kadro kiaomaw makanaelre akisalro iniya.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: yakai sa makavale,kota ka makanaelre maedede mwa kivaevang.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: ikai kaelrelrea yowata, Kecelre ai mwa laang,si karimoro iloko weysengce.
ch: 路途中，Kecelre想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Kecelre wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: la kwani wakisalro weysengce ki latabere, si konai ka makanaelre tobalre iniya amiyaikay, miyaliyako kadrowa iloko laiya.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: la kasasibolo tobitobi Kecelre, si kalisi mawriva amiyaikay ,asi kai akisalro weysengce nakowa makanaelre!
ch: Kecelre急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!
en: Kecelre burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: lamani ko latabere elraelra iniya, asiloiya kaso ilokoiyasono, lo akisalro moswa lamanema, kadrwy sawli!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: lo azana, mwlalakese ko Kecelre asabale kelanga baolo, na sawli lamanema idra wakisalro ini ki latabere.
ch: 隔天上學，Kecelre很早就到學校了，Kecelre把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Kecelre arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: ’ayy amoliyaili laiya ko Kecelre ki latabere, wathingalenganako laiya si loiganenga ai angiyailokako ,si kiyaseaseng ki latabere owakaene akisalro iniya lamanema.
ch: Kecelre向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Kecelre apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
